reducedMotion: Reduces or removes animations throughout the game for users sensitive to motion.
numberFormat: Choose how large numbers display: compact notation (1,234 K) or scientific notation (1.23e3).
hideUnaffordableUpgrades: Hides upgrades you cannot yet afford from the upgrades panel.
hideUnaffordableResearch: Hides research items you cannot yet afford from the research panel.
hideMaxUpgrades: Hides upgrades you have already purchased at maximum level.
hideMaxResearch: Hides research items you have already completed.
heatFlowVisible: Shows arrows on the reactor grid indicating heat flow direction between components.
heatMapVisible: Displays a color overlay on the grid showing relative heat levels (cool to hot).
debugOverlay: Shows debug flow arrows for developer diagnostics.
forceNoSAB: Forces the engine to disable Spatial Adaptation Buffer. Use only if experiencing simulation issues.
notifications: Enables browser notifications for game update alerts when the app is updated.
